selections.name: Vivarini
selections.reason: Consistent placed form in both starts, profiles nicely for this and gets a good draw.

selections.name: Master Taj
selections.reason: Placed in both career starts, capable of a better showing and progressing well.

selections.name: Koko
selections.reason: Showed good form last prep with multiple placings, has claims here fresh.

selections.name: Posh Chant
selections.reason: Debutant with good trial form, can run a bold race from an inside gate.

danger_horse.name: Points For Effort
danger_horse.reason: Back from a spell, trial placed and could improve.

selections.name: Mahershala
selections.reason: Ran 3rd on debut, won a recent trial. Elite Maher/Zahra combination provides a significant edge.

selections.name: Fast Freddie
selections.reason: Debutant who won a trial, represents a top yard and looks smart.

selections.name: Manhattan Joe
selections.reason: Debutant who won a trial, could surprise at odds.

selections.name: Summoned Lou
selections.reason: Improved to finish 3rd last start, can feature prominently.

danger_horse.name: Bright Star
danger_horse.reason: Trial winner resuming, much better placed here.

selections.name: Lady Of Bronte
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten two starts back, has ability and expected to feature.

selections.name: Frozen Princess
selections.reason: Ran 3rd on debut, shows ability and expected to improve. Wide draw is less of a penalty at this distance.

selections.name: Rainy Night
selections.reason: Trial winner from a top yard, has ability and looks a big chance despite the gate.

selections.name: Gran Paradiso
selections.reason: Placed form previously, tough draw but should be rattling home late.

danger_horse.name: Back Of The Boat
danger_horse.reason: Experienced maiden, could fill a minor placing.

selections.name: Bull Run
selections.reason: Waller runner with strong European form, 4th last start and should take catching.

selections.name: Just Swift
selections.reason: Consistent type who ran 2nd last start, peaks now and has each way claims.

selections.name: Seinfeld
selections.reason: Ran 4th on debut, in the minor mix with natural improvement.

selections.name: Share The Pennies
selections.reason: Consistent placed form, prefer to see her back in form but has claims.

danger_horse.name: Lyttelton
danger_horse.reason: Ran 5th last start, others rate better but can place.

selections.name: Outdrive
selections.reason: Won last start on a rain-affected track, returned in winning form and can go on with it.

selections.name: Annabelle Sunshine
selections.reason: Won last start in heavy going, in great form and can measure up again.

selections.name: Square Deal
selections.reason: Form hard to fault, 3rd last start and should be thereabouts.

selections.name: Zentorno
selections.reason: Fitter for recent racing and stepping up in trip will suit nicely.

danger_horse.name: Bow Ribbon
danger_horse.reason: Place best based on recent runs.

selections.name: Wild Ruby
selections.reason: Won last start in soft going, recent form is sound and can go on with it.

selections.name: Deadly Press
selections.reason: Racing well recently, hard to beat on his best form.

selections.name: Brazenga
selections.reason: Tracked the speed and boxed on steadily last start, drawn for every hope.

selections.name: The Bantam
selections.reason: Made significant ground last start for 2nd, should take holding out.

danger_horse.name: No Greater Vue
danger_horse.reason: Place hope based on recent efforts.

selections.name: Glam Award
selections.reason: Won on debut in soft going, very wary and look for any support.

selections.name: Hopes 'N' Dreams
selections.reason: Won last start in soft going, drawn for every hope to measure up.

selections.name: Ludlum
selections.reason: Class drop from LR company, progressive gelding who can make his mark fresh.

selections.name: Chowdown
selections.reason: Brings strong form and looks hard to beat from a good draw.

danger_horse.name: Rogue Warrior
danger_horse.reason: Fitter for recent racing and should be right there.

selections.name: Set Me Loose
selections.reason: Won last start, progressive sort who can pick up where she left off.

selections.name: In Haste
selections.reason: Class dropper with good record, can do much better in this grade.

selections.name: Wicked Storm
selections.reason: Solid form and could sneak into the finish fresh.

selections.name: Please Me Do
selections.reason: Recent form sound, ran 2nd last start and has claims.

danger_horse.name: Rosangela
danger_horse.reason: Handy sort who looks a key winning chance if she finds her best.
